file_insights.changes: Refactored state management from direct JSON file I/O to StateManager abstraction
file_insights.impact: Improved maintainability and reduced error handling boilerplate

patterns_discovered.description: Replaced json.load(open(TRADE_STATE)) and json.dump() with state_manager.get_trade_state() and state_manager.save_trade_state()
patterns_discovered.benefit: Centralized state management logic, easier to swap persistence layer

patterns_discovered.description: Removed try-except blocks in favor of null-checks on abstraction layer
patterns_discovered.benefit: Cleaner error handling, explicit state validation

patterns_discovered.description: Using symbol-keyed get/save methods: get_trade_state(SYMBOL) and save_trade_state(SYMBOL, t)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Supports multi-symbol operations, better state isolation

gotchas_discovered.description: state_manager.get_trade_state(SYMBOL) can return None, requiring defensive null check
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Added explicit 'if not t or not t.get("active")' check before accessing properties

gotchas_discovered.description: Original code silently ignored all exceptions; StateManager must handle persistence failures properly
gotchas_discovered.risk: Unhandled errors in save_trade_state() could silently fail without logging

gotchas_discovered.description: Code accesses 't["side"], t["entry"], t["sl"], etc.' without validation that StateManager ensures these fields exist
gotchas_discovered.risk: KeyError if StateManager returns incomplete trade state dict

approach_details.completion: Complete refactoring of state I/O layer
approach_details.quality: Clean abstraction with improved readability and error handling structure

recommendations.recommendation: Validate StateManager.save_trade_state() includes error logging and retry logic for persistence failures
recommendations.rationale: Original try-except silently swallowed errors; StateManager must maintain that safety without hiding failures

recommendations.recommendation: Add type hints and docstring to StateManager methods indicating expected dict structure and nullable returns
recommendations.rationale: Prevents KeyError surprises when accessing 'side', 'entry', 'sl', 'tp1', 'tp2' fields

recommendations.recommendation: Consider extracting field validation into a helper: validate_trade_state(t) before accessing nested properties
recommendations.rationale: Would catch StateManager bugs early and make the function more defensive

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration test verifying state persistence across check_active_trade() calls
recommendations.rationale: Ensure StateManager properly handles the complex state mutations (tp1_hit, active flags, timeouts)
